summary: Comprehensive Sellox SaaS POS Testing Complete - 30/30 backend tests passed, Frontend verified. Fixed 2 bugs: 1) StoreResponse/WarehouseResponse/UserResponse models had required created_at causing 500 errors, 2) log_audit function using `or` with database objects causing 500 on refunds. All multi-tenant isolation, role-based permissions, refund workflow, shop routes, and employee management features verified.
passed_tests: ✓ Super admin login (POST /api/auth/login) with admin/admin123 - returns token with role=admin
✓ Invalid admin password returns 401
✓ Tenant login (POST /api/auth/tenant-login) with tenant_id/username/password - returns tenant-scoped token
✓ Invalid tenant_id returns 404
✓ Invalid tenant credentials returns 401
✓ CRITICAL: Data isolation - Products created in Tenant 1 NOT visible in Tenant 2
✓ GET /api/auth/me for tenant user returns tenant_id
✓ Admin has all permissions including can_refund=true
✓ Cashier has can_refund=false
✓ POST /api/refunds as cashier returns 403 'No refund permission'
✓ POST /api/refunds as admin succeeds - returns refund_no
✓ GET /api/sales-orders/{order_no}/detail returns order with product names
✓ Order detail returns 404 for non-existent order
✓ Employee CRUD (POST/PUT/DELETE /api/employees) with custom permissions works
✓ Tenant plan features returned in permissions response (basic plan)
✓ Super admin gets enterprise plan features
✓ GET /api/shop/{tenant_id}/products returns tenant-only products
✓ GET /api/shop/{tenant_id}/info returns tenant name
✓ GET /api/shop/invalid_id/products returns 404
✓ Shop categories endpoint works
✓ Products CRUD (Create/Read/Update/Delete) in tenant works
✓ Sales order creation in tenant with inventory check works
✓ Inventory endpoint returns tenant-scoped data
✓ XSS payload in product name stored correctly (frontend escapes)
✓ Invalid/expired token returns 401
✓ Missing token returns 401/403
✓ Dashboard stats endpoint works
✓ Categories list works
✓ Customers list works
✓ Refunds history list works
✓ Frontend: Login page shows admin and tenant tabs
✓ Frontend: Admin dashboard shows Super Admin badge and Sellox branding
✓ Frontend: Employees page shows permission grid with checkboxes
✓ Frontend: POS page shows F2 Stock, F11 Refund buttons
✓ Frontend: Tenant shop (/shop/{tenantId}) shows tenant name and products
✓ Frontend: Invalid tenant shop shows 404 page
✓ Frontend: Tenant user sees 'Shop' button, NOT 'Shops' (super admin only)
✓ Frontend: Tenant user does NOT see Super Admin badge or SaaS商家管理

bugs_fixed.issue: StoreResponse, WarehouseResponse, UserResponse models had required created_at field causing validation errors for existing data
bugs_fixed.fix: Made created_at Optional with default=None for all three models

bugs_fixed.issue: log_audit function used `(audit_db or db)` which fails for MongoDB database objects - NotImplementedError: Database objects do not implement truth value testing
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to `target_db = audit_db if audit_db is not None else db`

critical_code_review_comments: The MongoDB database object truth-testing bug was causing 500 errors on refund operations - FIXED
Missing created_at on legacy tenant stores/warehouses caused 500 errors - FIXED
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing tenants and users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 25 requested test scenarios verified. Key findings: 1) Multi-tenant data isolation VERIFIED - products created in one tenant are NOT visible in another. 2) Role-based permissions working - cashiers blocked from refunds, admins allowed. 3) Custom employee permissions (can_refund=true for cashier) allows refund operation. 4) SaaS plan features returned in /api/auth/permissions response based on tenant plan. 5) Shop routes (/shop/{tenant_id}/*) correctly scope data to specific tenant. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_comprehensive_sellox.py covers all scenarios.

security_audit_summary.permission_enforcement: PASS - Role-based and custom permissions enforced
security_audit_summary.xss_protection: PASS - Backend stores as-is, frontend escapes
